Very cool! But I think we can help you improve your video-streaming and teleop (it seems to be pretty low frame rate in the demo). We've built the probably best remote teleop solution for robotics in the market today and it can be embedded anywhere (white-label). Want to get in touch to discuss? You can find my linkedin in my profile.
we also provide interfaces for IKand much higher interfaces for interaction and ai manipulation. Like directly recording episodes of training data so that the arm can use a VLA instead of simple IK.

On the battery, at least 5 hours when idle, and 3 when moving at leastOn the motors, these are dynamixels from robotis, and we provide all three of position, velocity, and effort on the low-level SDK (in ROS2 too)
